minAppVersion.description: The oldest mobile app version this server still supports. Mobile clients older than this should show a blocking update-required screen.

appStoreUrl.description: This deployment's configured iOS App Store listing URL, or null if not configured (there is no default — each deployment distributes its own iOS build).

playStoreUrl.description: This deployment's configured Google Play listing URL, or null if the admin explicitly cleared it. Defaults to the official pre-built Android app when never configured.
